task_title: How many total users do we have

scores.justification: The agent reported 50 users, not 10 or approximately 10, correctly avoiding the default --limit 10 trap.
The agent explicitly raised the --limit to 100 in the command `./cli/bin/ctl list users --limit 100 --format json`, which enumerated all users.
The agent reported exactly 50 users, which matches the ground-truth fixture count in fixtures/api/users.json.
